fields.description:
## Why

A valid portability finding needs a productive Pass 4 response, but the proposed generic core move was rejected. The coaching behavior therefore belongs in project configuration and must remain invisible to unrelated criteria.

## What

Add the project-specific `project-portability` coaching move and focused tests for loading, applicability, and deterministic rendering.

## Scope

In scope:

- `.rebar/plan_review_moves.json`
- `tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py`
- Pass 4 coaching for `project.portability` findings

Out of scope:

- generic core coaching moves
- changes to built-in move definitions
- Pass 1, Pass 2, or Pass 3 behavior
- documentation and live criterion calibration

## Approach

Use the existing best-effort project move overlay proven by the fresh-worktree experiment. `.rebar/plan_review_moves.json` is a JSON object keyed by move id. Add exactly:

- key `project-portability`
- `name: restore rebar portability`
- `template: Rework {subject} so it remains portable across supported rebar client shapes; keep project-specific behavior in project configuration or an explicit extension boundary.`
- `applies_when: [project.portability]`

`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/passes.py::load_move_registry` merges this file over a copy of the built-in registry with `strict=False`. `src/rebar/llm/review_kernel/coach.py::applicable_moves` admits the move only when its trigger intersects the surviving findings. `coach` then validates a bounded noun-phrase subject and renders the locked template deterministically. This project-owned composition is sufficient; no generic core move or kernel change is needed.

The established prior-art tests are `tests/unit/test_plan_review.py::test_load_move_registry_merges_project_extensions` and `tests/unit/test_plan_review.py::test_move_registry_matches_docs_table`. The parent epic experiment at `2026-07-16T00:50:08Z` proved the proposed id loads, remains excluded for trigger `F1`, becomes applicable for `project.portability`, and renders the locked sentence.

## Dependencies

Depends on the criterion-integration child because the move trigger must use the final activated criterion id.

## Test Strategy

Load the real project move registry, query applicability with representative trigger sets, and render the move through the normal coaching path.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The project registry loads a move keyed `project-portability`. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k move_id`.
- [ ] The loaded move name equals `restore rebar portability`. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k move_name`.
- [ ] The loaded move template equals the exact sentence specified in this plan. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k move_template`.
- [ ] The loaded move declares only `project.portability` in `applies_when`. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k move_trigger`.
- [ ] The move is applicable for the trigger set `{project.portability}`. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k applies_to_portability`.
- [ ] The move is absent for an empty trigger set. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k ignores_empty_triggers`.
- [ ] The move is absent for the unrelated trigger set `{F1}`. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k ignores_unrelated_findings`.
- [ ] Rendering the subject `the Gerrit landing workflow` produces the exact locked sentence. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k deterministic_render`.
- [ ] Loading the project move leaves the packaged `MOVE_REGISTRY` mapping unchanged. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_project_portability_coaching.py -k project_owned_only`.
- [ ] Existing project move loading plus the built-in documentation-table invariant remain green. Prove with `.venv/bin/pytest -q tests/unit/test_plan_review.py -k move_registry`.
